title: After U.S. SEC, Treasury and Justice Department offer billionaire Gautam Adani legal relief
summary_full: The U.S. Treasury Department settled a case against Adani Enterprises, involving the purchase of sanctioned Iranian energy between November 2023 and June 2025.
summary_public: The U.S. Treasury Department settled a case against Adani Enterprises, involving the purchase of sanctioned Iranian energy between November 2023 and June 2025.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: settled a case against Adani Enterprises, involving the purchase of sanctioned Iranian energy
